016package org.consensusj.jsonrpc.introspection.sample;
017
018import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.JsonRpcError;
019import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.JsonRpcRequest;
020import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.JsonRpcResponse;
021import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.JsonRpcService;
022import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.introspection.AbstractJsonRpcService;
023import org.consensusj.jsonrpc.introspection.JsonRpcServiceWrapper;
024import org.slf4j.Logger;
025import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
026
027import java.lang.invoke.MethodHandles;
028import java.lang.reflect.Method;
029import java.util.Arrays;
030import java.util.Map;
031import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
032import java.util.concurrent.ExecutionException;
033
034/**
035 * Simple service and command-line tool that contains a "math" JsonRpcService
036 * Allows testing method dispatch independent of any server code or framework
037 * (including compiling with Graal `native-image` and running as a native tool with SubstrateVM)
038 * This will be moved or removed in a future release.
039 */
040public class MathService extends AbstractJsonRpcService {
041    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(MathService.class);
042    private static final Map<String, Method> methods = JsonRpcServiceWrapper.reflect(MethodHandles.lookup().lookupClass());
043
044    /**
045     * Constructor that calls {@link AbstractJsonRpcService#AbstractJsonRpcService(Map)} with a private, statically-initialized
046     * {@link Map} of methods generated with {@link JsonRpcServiceWrapper#reflect(Class)}  }.
047     */
048    public MathService() {
049        super(methods);
050    }
051
052    public static void main(String[] args) throws ExecutionException, InterruptedException {
053        JsonRpcService service = new MathService();
054        JsonRpcRequest req = new JsonRpcRequest("add", Arrays.asList(1, 2));
055        JsonRpcResponse<Object> response =  service.call(req).get();
056
057        Integer sum = (Integer) response.getResult();
058        if (sum != null) {
059            System.out.println("Sum is: " + sum);
060        } else {
061            String message = response.getError() != null
062                    ? response.getError().getMessage()
063                    : "error was null";
064            System.err.println("Error = " + message);
065            System.exit(-1);
066        }
067    }
068
069    public CompletableFuture<Integer> add(Integer a, Integer b) {
070        log.info("MathService: add {} + {}",a,b);
071        return result(a + b);
072    }
073
074    public CompletableFuture<Integer> subtract(Integer a, Integer b) {
075        log.info("MathService: subtract {} - {}",a,b);
076        return result(a - b);
077    }
078
079    @Override
080    public void close() throws Exception {
081    }
082}
